title: Tunisian Sausage Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap filled with Tunisian sausages, perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Char-grill the Tunisian sausages for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill the sliced onions and bell peppers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the grilled sausages, onions, and bell peppers inside.
Drizzle with fiery sauce and German mustard.
